# dependencytrack_oidc_group (Data Source)

Fetches an OpenID Connect (OIDC) group from Dependency-Track by name. OIDC groups are plain database entities and can be looked up without an identity provider configured.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an OIDC group by name
data "dependencytrack_oidc_group" "example" {
  name = "platform-engineers"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the OIDC group to look up

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The UUID of the OIDC group
